contentBlocks.original:
उदधिः क्रमणःश्चैव सीताशोक विनाशकः ।
लक्ष्मणः प्राणदाताच दशग्रीवस्य दर्पहा ।
द्वादशैतानि नामानि कपीदस्य महात्मनः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
udadhiḥ kramaṇaḥścaiva sītāśoka vināśakaḥ .
lakṣmaṇaḥ prāṇadātāca daśagrīvasya darpahā .
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni kapīdasya mahātmanaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Hanuman, son of Anjana, offspring of Vayu, very strong, ever immersed in Rama, friend of Arjuna, reddish-eyed like a lion, a personality of unlimited valorous deeds, the crosser of the ocean, destroyer of Sita's grief, life-giver to Lakshmana, one who crushed the pride and haughtiness of Ravana - these are the twelve names of the great leader of monkeys.
contentBlocks.meanings: उदधिः (udadhiḥ) – ocean; क्रमणः (kramaṇaḥ) – crosser; च (ca) – and; एव (eva) – indeed; सीताशोक (sītāśoka) – Sita's grief (sītā:Sita | śoka:grief); विनाशकः (vināśakaḥ) – destroyer; लक्ष्मणः (lakṣmaṇaḥ) – Lakshmana; प्राणदाताच (prāṇadātā ca) – life-giver and (prāṇa:life | dātā:giver | ca:and); दशग्रीवस्य (daśagrīvasya) – of Ravana (daśa:ten | grīva:necks); दर्पहा (darpahā) – pride crusher (darpa:pride | hā:crusher); द्वादश (dvādaśa) – twelve; एतानि (etāni) – these; नामानि (nāmāni) – names; कपीदस्य (kapīdasya) – of the monkey leader (kapi:monkey | īda:leader); महात्मनः (mahātmanaḥ) – of the great soul (mahā:great | ātmanaḥ:soul);
